accepted.reason: Mass-spectrometry ion-index and spectrum binning kernels with clear array-loop optimization opportunities.
Structured matrix-construction loops for 1D linear systems; good standalone numerical kernel material.
Low-level IP prefix/address manipulation routines with deterministic branch-heavy logic.
Classic tight integer loop benchmark useful as a lightweight optimization task.

skipped.reason: Application/domain object model code rather than focused compute-kernel logic.
Large algorithm class with heavy external image-processing dependencies; too broad for current batch.
Highly specialized physics code with custom C structs/types not portable to standalone GRPO example.
Type-system regression test code, not an optimization-target kernel.
C++/TensorRT binding wrapper and logging API, not suitable for standalone Cython speedup training.
Interpreter exec-scope behavior tests, not relevant to compute-kernel optimization.
